Favorite.title: Favorite Route
Favorite.description: A user's saved favorite transit route (Bus or MTR)

timestamp.description: Time when the favorite was added

route.description: Bus route number (if type is bus)

stopId.description: Bus stop ID (if type is bus)

stopName.description: Bus stop name (if type is bus)

serviceType.description: Bus service type (if type is bus)

line.description: MTR line code (if type is mtr)

lineName.description: MTR line name (if type is mtr)

station.description: MTR station code (if type is mtr)

stationName.description: MTR station name (if type is mtr)

color.description: MTR line color (if type is mtr)
